user.title: Media Art Wrapper — Player
user.description: Select the media player to wrap and choose how its content should be categorised.

data_description.entity_kind: Choose whether to create a wrapper player, a combined player, or both.
data_description.source_entity_id: The media player entity whose artwork will be resolved. Required for wrapper types.
data_description.display_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant. Leave blank to use the player name.
data_description.category: Determines which artwork providers are used. Choose Auto to try all providers.

artwork.title: Media Art Wrapper — Artwork
artwork.description: Configure the artwork image dimensions, fallback behaviour, and optional API keys.

data.fallback_mode: Fallback when no artwork is found

data_description.ratio: Preset dimensions for the artwork image. Choose Custom to enter exact pixel values.
data_description.artwork_width: Only used when Custom is selected above.
data_description.artwork_height: Only used when Custom is selected above.
data_description.fallback_mode: What to show when no artwork can be found for the current track.
data_description.fallback_custom_url: Full URL to an image shown when no artwork is found. Only used when Custom URL is selected above.
data_description.tmdb_api_key: Required for The Movie Database streaming artwork. Leave blank to skip.
data_description.igdb_client_id: Twitch developer app Client ID, required for IGDB game cover art.
data_description.igdb_client_secret: Twitch developer app Client Secret, required for IGDB game cover art.
data_description.steamgriddb_api_key: Optional. Enables high-quality community game art from SteamGridDB. Steam Store artwork works without a key.
data_description.fanart_api_key: Optional. Enables TV show logos and posters from Fanart.tv.
data_description.porndb_api_key: Optional Bearer token for theporndb.net (§6.4 prio 3). Without a key the public endpoint is tried but may return nothing.
data_description.aebn_api_key: Optional Bearer token for AEBN's affiliate API (§6.4 prio 4). Most calls return nothing without a key.
data_description.epg_sensor: Catch-all sensor of the HA-EPG integration. Used when the active channel has no entry in the per-channel map below.
data_description.epg_sensor_map: One mapping per line: 'channel=sensor.entity_id'. Channel match is case-insensitive. Falls back to the catch-all sensor when no entry hits.
data_description.epg_full_lookup_channels: Channels for which a full EPG lookup (TVMaze + TMDb) is performed. All other channels just receive their channel_icon directly. Matching is case-insensitive. Default: ARD/ZDF/WDR/arte + public-broadcaster family (§5.1).
data_description.maw_sensor_tv_input: Default: sensor.tv_active_input (§7.1). Values: ps5/atv/live_tv/tv_on_idle/none — drives the §2.3 artwork hierarchy.
data_description.maw_sensor_discord_game: Default: sensor.discord_active_game_atomic (§7.1). Numeric sensor (>0 = game active).
data_description.maw_sensor_stash_active: §7.2 — does not exist yet. Leave empty or provide your own binary_sensor.

combined.title: Media Art Wrapper — Combined Player
combined.description: Optionally create a virtual combined player that aggregates multiple media players.

data.combined_sources: Sources (leave empty to use all configured wrappers)

data_description.create_combined: When enabled, creates a virtual media_player entity and a cover image entity aggregating the sources below.
data_description.combined_name: Used to name the entities: media_player.NAME and image.NAME_cover. Use lowercase letters and underscores only.
data_description.auto_priority: Gaming has highest priority, then Streaming, TV, Music, Auto.
data_description.combined_source_1: Priority ordered: PLAYING or BUFFERING beats PAUSED or IDLE, which beats ON. Lower slot number wins within the same tier.
data_description.combined_audio_sources: Entities that receive volume, shuffle and playback commands. If empty, commands are sent to the active display entity.
data_description.combined_delegate_1: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_2: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_3: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_4: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_5: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_6: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_7: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_delegate_8: If set, browse, queue and control commands are forwarded to this entity. Useful for Music Assistant with HomePods or native PS5 control.
data_description.combined_role_1: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2). 'Other' = slot is not part of the scenario-based routing.
data_description.combined_role_2: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_3: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_4: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_5: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_6: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_7: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).
data_description.combined_role_8: Role of this slot in the CMP priority table (§2.2).

abort.already_configured: This media player is already configured.

init.title: Media Art Wrapper — Player
init.description: Update the category and display name for this media player.

data_description.display_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.category: Determines which artwork providers are used. Choose Auto to try all providers.
